lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, I wonder if you could help me on this whole brewing thing...

lines.speaker: Blandebir
lines.text: I might be able to - what do you need to know?

lines.speaker: Blandebir
lines.text: Well first off you need to fill the vat with water - two bucketfuls should do the trick. Then you'll need to put in two handfuls of barley malt - that's roasted barley by the way.

lines.speaker: Blandebir
lines.text: After that you'll be putting your main ingredient in - this will decide which ale it is you're brewing. There should be some good guides around with recipes in.

lines.speaker: Blandebir
lines.text: Lastly you pour a pot full of ale yeast in, which'll start it off fermenting. Then all you have to do is wait for the good stuff.

lines.speaker: Blandebir
lines.text: First you'll need some apples. You'll need to crush them using this cider-press - four apples should make a full bucket of apple-mush. Take four buckets of mush and fill up the vat.

lines.speaker: Blandebir
lines.text: After that you pour a pot full of ale yeast in, which'll start it off fermenting. Then all you have to do is wait for the good stuff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I do once my ale has matured?

lines.speaker: Blandebir
lines.text: Well, once you've got a full vat of the good stuff, just turn the valve and your barrel will fill up with eight pints of whatever your chosen tipple is. Mind it's an empty barrel, though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any spare ale yeast?

lines.speaker: Blandebir
lines.text: Well, as a matter of fact I do, although I wouldn't describe it as spare. This ale yeast I've got is the best money can buy, but if you've got a pot I'll fill it for you for 25GP - very cheap as it happens.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have an empty pot, or enough money I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have an empty pot I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have enough money I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a good deal - please fill my pot with ale yeast for 25GP.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, that's too much I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all I need to know, thanks.
